name: web-tools
description: The portable set from mehrlander/web-tools as installable plugins: the working-conventions loader, the surfacing caption, the skill-library loader, the show-repo instrument, and the daisy-alpine reference.

plugins.name: portable
plugins.description: The to-go bag: /portable:web-tools (load the portable working conventions), /portable:caption (the surfacing caption), /portable:load-skill (fetch any skill from the library), /portable:show-repo (browse and move files across repos), /portable:tasks (operate the cross-session project tracker), and /portable:tree (render a linked file tree for chat).

plugins.name: daisy-alpine
plugins.description: DaisyUI 5 + Tailwind 4 + Alpine.js reference for single-file HTML artifacts. Model-invocable, so it triggers on matching artifact work without being asked.
